name: The Company for Cooperative Insurance
summary: The Company for Cooperative Insurance provides various insurance and reinsurance solutions for individuals and companies in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It operates through Medical, Motor, Property and Casualty, Protection and Saving, and Manafeth segments. The company offers motor, medical, property and casualty, takaful, engineering and contractors, industrial and energy, telecommunications and IT, financial and investment, transportation, retail and trading, fire, marine, aviation, liability, energy, general accidents, home, international travel, medical malpractice, shop owners, and protection and savings insurance products. It also provides third party liability insurance for foreign vehicles. The company was formerly known as National Company for Cooperative Insurance and changed its name to The Company for Cooperative Insurance in 2004. The Company for Cooperative Insurance was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
